title: Creamy British Grain Trifle
description: A creamy and rich dessert featuring layers of grain, creamy custard, and sweet fruit, all wrapped in a pandan leaf for a unique and flavorful treat. This dish is halal-friendly and made with unsalted butter and infused oil for added depth of flavor.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together the melted butter, infused oil, and custard powder.
Add the milk and sugar to the bowl and whisk until smooth.
Cook the mixture over medium heat, stirring constantly, until it thickens.
In a separate bowl, mix together the cooked grain and mixed berries.
To assemble the trifle, create a layer of grain in the bottom of a pandan leaf wrap.
Pour some of the creamy custard over the grain.
Repeat the layers until all ingredients are used, ending with a layer of custard on top.
Chill the trifle in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes before serving.
